violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per phone call with manager, manger is taking class the 25th and will submit application after. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The establishment can't provide additional ingredient information on food available for self service. Per PIC, management will be contacted to provided additional information on self service product. Per manager, they will reach out to management for ingredient information. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

All food in the walk-in was observed held at 48-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, product was held out of temperature for an unknown time. All product disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

The establishment can't provide additional ingredient information on food available for self service. Per PIC, management will be contacted to provided additional information on self service product. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
Per PIC the walk-in condenser periodically turns off due to breaker issues. Electrician to be contacted. Walk-in must not be used for TCS foods until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

At the time of inspection, pastries were observed for customer self-selection in a display case. Bulk FOOD that is available for CONSUMER self-dispensing shall be prominently labeled with the common name of the FOOD, or absent a common name, an adequately descriptive identity statement, If made from two or more ingredients, a list of ingredients and sub-ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight, including a declaration of artificial colors, artificial flavors and chemical preservatives, if contained in the FOOD. PIC stated establishment will create a folder with all foods ingredients listed inside. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Walk-in door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
A large accumulation of miscellaneous debris was observed stored by the dumpster. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
